issues.description: Action should be 'Rest' with duration 'DuringYourTurn' to represent 'cannot attack until the start of your next turn'. Current Rest action lacks duration specification; needs duration:"DuringYourTurn"
Second effect (Trigger with HasRestingDon condition) is not supported by card text and appears to be erroneous. Card text contains only [On Play] trigger; no secondary effect exists.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] If your Leader's type includes "Baroque Works", up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less cannot attack until the start of your next turn.
